meta.name: Adzmyst Glyph Canon
meta.description: The 22 Proto-Sinaitic glyphs — the mother alphabet. Seven are sacred (the ADZMYST acronym). All map to Major Arcana.
meta.sacredMeaning: The mystic's adze — the tool that carves meaning from silence

glyphs.name: Aleph
glyphs.adzmist: Strength, beginning, the pull. What draws the plow through unbroken ground.

glyphs.name: Bet
glyphs.adzmist: Container, shelter, the body. What holds the spirit in the world.

glyphs.name: Gimel
glyphs.adzmist: Journey, carrying, endurance. What moves across the desert of the self.

glyphs.name: Dalet
glyphs.adzmist: Threshold, passage, choice. What opens between what was and what will be.

glyphs.name: He
glyphs.adzmist: Revelation, light, seeing. What illuminates the room from outside.

glyphs.name: Waw
glyphs.adzmist: Connection, binding, attachment. What links what would otherwise drift apart.

glyphs.name: Zayin
glyphs.adzmist: Division, cutting, judgment. What separates the necessary from the excess.

glyphs.name: Heth
glyphs.adzmist: Enclosure, boundary, protection. What marks the edge of the sacred.

glyphs.name: Teth
glyphs.adzmist: Wisdom, danger, the coiled. What waits in the grass to teach.

glyphs.name: Yod
glyphs.adzmist: Action, making, crafting. What reaches out to shape the world.

glyphs.name: Kaph
glyphs.adzmist: Bend, surrender, opening. What yields so that something may enter.

glyphs.name: Lamed
glyphs.adzmist: Authority, direction, control. What guides the strength already present.

glyphs.name: Mem
glyphs.adzmist: Chaos, depth, the unconscious. What flows beneath the surface.

glyphs.name: Nun
glyphs.adzmist: Eternity, renewal, shedding. What dies and is reborn in the same skin.

glyphs.name: Samek
glyphs.adzmist: Support, stability, what holds. The structure that does not ask to be seen.

glyphs.name: Ayin
glyphs.adzmist: Perception, witness, vision. What sees without being seen.

glyphs.name: Pe
glyphs.adzmist: Speech, breath, prophecy. What speaks the world into being.

glyphs.name: Tsade
glyphs.adzmist: Harvest, gathering, catch. What brings in what was cast out.

glyphs.name: Qoph
glyphs.adzmist: Cycle, return, the eternal. What sets and rises again.

glyphs.name: Resh
glyphs.adzmist: Beginning again, leadership. What thinks, therefore what is.

glyphs.name: Shin
glyphs.adzmist: Consumption, fire, transformation. What devours to make way for the new.

glyphs.name: Taw
glyphs.adzmist: Signature, completion, seal. What says: this is finished, this is true.
